status: new V2 artifact family; older failed crate files intentionally left intact
material_priority: PETG, light filament use over maximum stack strength

requirements.visibility_cutouts: repeating vertical slot windows, about 10 x 24 mm, staggered rows, 12 mm minimum same-row ligament
requirements.handholds: side arched/peaked handholds about 68 x 24 mm with no long unsupported bridge
requirements.label_area: front plaque kept free of cutouts

test_plan: Generate STL, STEP, and manifest for full crate and validation coupon.
Validate crate and coupon bounds are within the Creality K1 build volume.
Slice validation coupon first with PETG 250 C nozzle, 70 C bed, supports off, no brim unless adhesion failure is proven.
Inspect G-code for enable_support = 0, no ;TYPE:Support, all X/Y paths inside 0..220, and lower filament than the previous 287.84 g full-crate job.
Only print the full crate after the coupon validates clean slot roofs, handle roof, and stack-corner fit.
